channel.title: FTP on Tech blog
channel.description: Recent content in FTP on ych3r.github.io

item.title: HTB-Crocodile
item.description: This box is about “FTP”. Scan ┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/htb] └─$ nmap -sC -sV 10.129.89.19 Starting Nmap 7.92 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2022-05-31 …

item.title: HTB-Fawn
item.description: This box is about “FTP”. FTP is a file transfer service. Scan ┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/htb/fawn] └─$ nmap -sC -sV 10.129.234.156 Starting Nmap 7.92 …
